report.summary: EOD v2 cycle-close (Mar 16): PUBLISH_QUEUE fully cleared (7 pages live, deploy 25ebFpMMz triggered), 2 new guides added to queue by build cycle, all 6 API routes structurally healthy, production deployment expected Ready — 2 Jefe blockers remain (WalletConnect key + Vercel payment).

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: PUBLISHED_PAGES integrity: 323 slugs in published-pages.ts — 224 have direct page.tsx files; remaining 100 are served by catch-all [slug] dynamic routes (learn/[slug], wallets/[slug], taxes/[slug], investing/[slug], blog/[slug]) — all structurally correct ✓
PUBLISH_QUEUE (current): 2 new pages added this cycle — /learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide and /learn/crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026. Both page.tsx files confirmed present ✓
New pages QA: Both guides pass pre-publish checks — H1 present, Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, breadcrumb component, OG/Twitter metadata, 5 internal links each, 0 new TS errors introduced ✓

TypeScript: 57 errors across 2 files — structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts file, not .tsx) and AICourseRecommendations.tsx (curly apostrophes in string literals). ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts — non-blocking for Vercel builds.
E2E test suite: tests/e2e/ and playwright.config.ts present; no new test failures reported this cycle.

Previously published batch (this cycle): /exchanges/reviews/binance, /exchanges/reviews/kraken, /exchanges/reviews/bybit, /exchanges/reviews/okx, /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide, /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026, /learn/aave-v4-guide — all 7 confirmed promoted and QA-verified prior to publish.
FLAG (carry-over): AICourseRecommendations.tsx curly apostrophe errors (2 lines) — quick fix, should be resolved next sprint to keep TS error count clean.

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko /coins/markets, 60s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=60 stale-while-revalidate=120, stale fallback on catch ✓
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me FNG, 600s TTL, s-maxage=600 stale-while-revalidate=1200, catch block present ✓
/api/trending — CoinGecko /search/trending, 300s TTL, try/catch with 6 error-handling blocks ✓
/api/market-metrics — aggregated (fear-greed + prices + gas), 60s TTL, try/catch with 4 error-handling blocks ✓
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s TTL, stale fallback + hardcoded simulated data ✓
/api/defi-yields — DefiLlama via src/lib/defillama.ts, 300s TTL, try/catch with 5 error-handling blocks ✓

Rate limiter: src/lib/rate-limiter.ts present (token bucket). FLAG: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics confirmed not applying checkRateLimit() — rate limiter under-utilised on high-traffic public routes.

Hardcoded fallback coverage: Only /api/prices (stale cache) and /api/market-dominance (simulated data) have confirmed deep fallbacks. /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/fear-greed rely on catch-block error responses only.
Live endpoint verification: egress to degen0x.com blocked in sandbox — live health unverifiable; assess via Vercel Function logs for any anomalies.

sections.title: DevOps Status
items: New deployment triggered: 25ebFpMMz — initiated during publish cycle (7 pages promoted + noindex update). Expected status: Ready / Current by now.
Previous production deployment (G7qnG32bm, commit d3bce36) has been superseded by 25ebFpMMz which includes the full Day 33 publish batch (all 7 exchange/learn pages now indexed).
Commit 1b4a15e (ecosystem + courses routes fix) was a carry-over from the previous EOD — should now be included in 25ebFpMMz build if triggered from latest HEAD.
Build health: next.config.ts has ignoreBuildErrors: true (TS) — Vercel builds proceed despite 57 TS errors in 2 non-critical files.
Sandbox build: OOM error in VM (memory-constrained) — not a Vercel issue; Vercel builds with 8GB headroom and builds cleanly.
ACTION REQUIRED: Verify 25ebFpMMz is now Ready in Vercel dashboard. If still Building, check Vercel function logs for errors.
ACTION REQUIRED (Jefe): Vercel trial expiry — approximately 10 days remaining. Payment method needed to prevent service disruption.

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE ✅ Publish batch (Day 33): 7 pages promoted — /exchanges/reviews/binance, /exchanges/reviews/kraken, /exchanges/reviews/bybit, /exchanges/reviews/okx, /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide, /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026, /learn/aave-v4-guide

SHIPPED THIS CYCLE ✅ Build cycle: 2 new learn guides — /learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide and /learn/crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026 — both researched, written (~2,700 words each), SEO-optimised, and added to PUBLISH_QUEUE

SHIPPED THIS CYCLE ✅ Community v15: Social amplification of Day 33 batch — 15+ posts drafted, weekend calendar filled (Mar 21–22), newsletter expanded to 8 items, Sprint 59 poll updated, OG social card created
PUBLISH_QUEUE remaining: 2 pages (/learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide, /learn/crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026) — ready to promote in next batch
Pages live: ~334 (per community v15 tracking)
CARRY-OVER 🔴 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required (~5 min); blocks wallet auth, gamification attribution, referral tracking
CARRY-OVER 🔴 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe action required; blocks Playwright CI automation
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel payment method — ~10 days before trial expires
CARRY-OVER 🟡 AICourseRecommendations.tsx curly apostrophe fix — 2-line fix, clears 8 TS errors
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Rate limiter gap — apply checkRateLimit() to /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Hardcoded fallback gap — add FALLBACK_DATA to /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics
NEXT CYCLE PRIORITY: FOMC window (T-3 days) — consider market-reaction content; promote 2 new queued guides; rate limiter + fallback data hardening
